summary: Frontend-only test of new Product Category taxonomy on /shop and Admin ProductForm. Shop sidebar shows both Collection and new Product Category filter blocks with all 6 seeded values (For Peace, For Wealth, Meditation, Enlightenment, Daily Wear, Relationships). Clicking filter-pc-for-wealth updated URL to ?pc=For+Wealth and filtered products correctly. Combining Collection=mukhi-rudraksha + pc=For Wealth intersected to 1 product (7 Mukhi). Active chips visible with X (mukhi-rudraksha X, For Wealth X). Admin edit form shows Product Category input (data-testid=pf-collection) with existing value; edited Relationships->For Peace, saved, reopened form and value persisted. Restored seed value after test.
passed: Shop page loads and renders Product Category FilterBlock with all 6 slugs (for-peace, for-wealth, meditation, enlightenment, daily-wear, relationships)
Active filter chips visible for both category and pc filters with X close
Collection filter (filter-cat-*), Mukhi/Origin/Price still render (no regression on sidebar)
Admin ProductForm displays Product Category input (data-testid=pf-collection) with label 'Product Category'
Editing pf-collection value and Save persists to Supabase; reopening confirms persisted value (Relationships -> For Peace -> restored)

failed.issue: One collection option has malformed slug 'rudraksh under the hood' (data-testid=filter-cat-rudraksh under the hood) — has spaces in testid and label 'Rudraksh' looks like leaked debug/placeholder seed row
Filter chips render visually with X but lack data-testid (e.g., chip-pc-for-wealth). Chip X clear was validated visually but not via testid selector
failed.evidence: document.querySelectorAll for chip testids returned []; chips visible in screenshot

action_items: Investigate stray 'Rudraksh' collection value in categories/seed data (filter-cat-rudraksh under the hood)
Optional: add data-testid to active filter chips (chip-pc-<slug>, chip-cat-<slug>) for automated chip-clear testing
